summary: QA testing of 10 CRs/bugs in POS React frontend app. All 10 items verified successfully through UI testing and code review.

details: 6 KPI cards present: Opening Balance, Cash Collected, Total Funds, Settled, Remaining, Pilferage
Total Funds formula verified: Opening Balance + Cash Collected (line 269 in code)
Expected formula verified: Total Funds - Settled (NOT minus pilferage) - line 250 in code
TOTAL row Expected = sum(Total Funds) - sum(Settled) - line 355 in code
Order Reports children correctly named: 'Daily Report', 'Daily Summary', 'Daily Room Report'
No X/Y/Z Report entries found
Code verified: lines 54-60 in Sidebar.jsx
Insights section shows 'Item Ledger' (not 'Items & Menu')
Code verified: line 74 in Sidebar.jsx
Bottom section (Ringer/Refresh/User/Logout) stays pinned when nav sections expanded
All 4 elements visible after expanding all sidebar sections
CSS verified: nav has 'flex-1 overflow-y-auto min-h-0', bottom section has 'flex-shrink-0'
Loading screen shows 6 items (not 7)
Items: Profile & Permissions, Categories, Products, Tables, Settings, Running Orders
No 'Popular' tab in API_LOADING_ORDER (lines 281-288 in constants.js)
MAX_RETRIES = 3 (line 70 in LoadingPage.jsx)
Retry button shows 'Attempt N of 3' format (line 813)
After 3 retries shows disabled button with data-testid='retry-exhausted' (line 816)
Disabled button has data-testid='retry-button-disabled' (line 821)
TOTAL CREDIT shows real value: ₹1,64,638.05
TOTAL PAID shows real value: ₹13,055.50
OUTSTANDING shows: ₹1,51,582.55
Values are NOT dashes/placeholders
'check in' items NOT appearing in Item Ledger
'check in' items NOT appearing in Order Ledger
'check in' items NOT appearing in Cancellations
Code verified: insightsService.js lines 147-148, 831-832, 924-927; reportTransform.js line 963
Insights reports load correctly with data
No NaN values found in reports
No missing fields or blank columns observed
Dashboard, Order Ledger, Cancellations, Sales, Item Ledger all loading properly
Date picker shows consistent dates across different Insights reports
Cache implementation verified in insightsCache.js
fetchOrReuse function handles deduplication of concurrent requests

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 CRs/bugs verified successfully. The app connects to external APIs at preprod.mygenie.online. Login flow works correctly. Settlement panel and Credit Management are slide-over panels accessed from sidebar. Insights reports are under the Insights section in sidebar. Test data exists for May 2026 dates.
